description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the alpine:latest Docker image. Define a deploy stage with two jobs: ipax and pages. The ipax job runs only on the master branch, installs lftp via apk --no-cache add lftp, then runs lftp -c "set ftp:ssl-allow no; open -u $FTP_USERNAME,$FTP_PASSWORD $HOST; mirror -Rnev ./public . --ignore-time --parallel=10" to upload the public directory. The pages job also runs only on master, publishes the public/ directory as an artifact, and its script echoes 'Nothing to do...' .
